commands.observation: Both targeted governance tests passed; terminal output also showed the governed setup sequence granting timelock governance/admin/operational roles and revoking deployer emergency, risk admin, treasury, minter, and admin roles.

The printed snapshot showed deployer=false for AccessManager admin plus governance/emergency/riskAdmin/treasury/minter roles, timelock=true for those AccessManager roles, deployer=false for TimelockController DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, and governor=true for TimelockController PROPOSER_ROLE.
